concerns.detail: Disclosure of full names of students (Yufei Ding and Hao Ran Geng) along with their romantic relationship and specific academic misconduct allegations, violating privacy of private individuals
concerns.excerpt: Yufei Ding (PKU)...今年stanford的phd，hao ran geng 的女朋友，纯学术妲 己,考试还作弊

concerns.detail: Lab-specific descriptors detailed enough to de-anonymize a specific intern, including specific paper rejection history, recommendation letter content, and application outcomes
concerns.excerpt: 这intern和phd(我)之前一起合作, 他自己有篇paper一直没中...申请的时候给初稿写的是'Strongest Student of this year'

concerns.detail: Gendered personal attack using the slur 'academic Daji' (妲己) to demean a female student based on unsupported character judgments about her relationship rather than concrete advising practices
